item.title: 15 Hololive Events to Check Out Around Expo & Fes 2026(Overview)
item.author: Linsaloty
item.content:encoded:
Sorry for the long video! Feel free to use the timestamps to skip around to whatever interest you! I added a bonus event that I meant to put but forgot in the pinned comment!
Find me on X: https://twitter.com/linsaloty BGM: "Shower" by https://www.youtube.com/@KyattoWorks ・Hololive goods and haul playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct4reBt9faUqqR1gBYMpPk4l ・Hololive event overview playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct747dYypRmQIIfyGFXxB3yg ・Hololive event/collab vlog playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZA05Mx0fct5KQkT5pLgMt7m4rtRiKcLl
▼Related Videos▼ ・Trying out Sakura Miko's Taiyaki (+collab overview): https://youtu.be/ma9HzFuQVe8 ・Visiting the Yuuki Sakuna Collab Cafe: https://youtu.be/7oP7qXAz8aM ・Visiting the Hololive HoloX Raku Spa Collab: https://youtu.be/5leGB482JsI ・Visiting the Hololive Gen1 Raku Spa Collab: https://youtu.be/eOvlbB7nbP8 ・Visiting the Ayamy Family Collab Cafe: https://youtu.be/QXZfWabflEk
▼Related Links▼ 2/20-3/31 Sakura Miko Taiyaki 🔗 https://brick-collabo.com/sakuramikotaiyaki2026/
2/13-3/15 Holowitch Pop up and Fes 📍 https://maps.app.goo.gl/dvY8g91CAw2swRxV9 🔗 https://www.gamers.co.jp/contents/event_fair/detail.php?id=7173&a8=6trbQtXCZpNbCzF7evNj..s3L-U7NCsb3vN9..Npl9JCZpr0YpEtNzr6lpU353EN891zORrw8trbcs00000020023001
2/6-3/15 Sweets Paradise collab cafe 📍(Tokyo): https://maps.app.goo.gl/CjRCWvEfCwYsDHyQ7 🔗 https://merch-matome.com/sweet-paradise-westa-de-cooking/
1/30-4/9 NEPOLABO Monster Hunter crane games and cafe 📍(Ikebukuro): https://maps.app.goo.gl/4v5N8JTFZUHbTf8C6 🔗 https://www.capcom.co.jp/amusement/monsterhunterwilds-hololive/ 🔗 https://www.capcom.co.jp/amusement/game/prize/11091/
2/26-3/29 Sayama Ski Resort Snow Party collab 📍 https://maps.app.goo.gl/KBgUTZCeCZyxcoJ16 🔗 https://atfes.com/contents/snowparty
3/5-4/3 NEPOLABO Tree Village collab 📍 (Tokyo): https://maps.app.goo.gl/k4trgLbbMa2Ru4kJA 🔗 https://tree-village.jp/news/014419.html
3/5-3/31 Raku Spa Hololive Gamers collab 🔗 https://rakuspa.com/hololive8/
2/13-3/9 HoloMeet Pop Up Shop in Narita Airport 📍 Narita Airport Terminal 1 Central Building 4F 🔗 https://prtimes.jp/main/html/rd/p/000000141.000016010.html 🔗 https://hololive.hololivepro.com/news/20260206-02-79
2/7-3/22 Hololive DEV_IS New Wave Pop Up Store in OIOI 📍(Hakata): https://maps.app.goo.gl/uRLD5j8osvzH4FL66 🔗 https://www.0101.co.jp/405/info/index.html?contents_id=1033
3/12-4/6 Flow Glow Tower Record collab cafe 📍(Shibuya): https://maps.app.goo.gl/suNy6xY9D7fSsSi2A 🔗 https://tower.jp/article/news/2026/02/08/c101
3/6-3/29 Saba & Roa Pop Up Store Kaijin-Sai 📍(Tokyo): https://maps.app.goo.gl/PsL6JCXBbLLtaMV59 🔗 https://tokyoanimecenter.jp/en/information/popup-kaijinsai-na/
3/13-3/26 Roa Pop Up Shop in Tokyo Station 📍(1st Floor): https://maps.app.goo.gl/feT7L1buaTLX9AXA8 🔗 https://eeo.today/pr/kurageuroa-tokyo/?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=20260219_KROA
3/7-3/22 Ayamy Family Cafe 3 📍 https://maps.app.goo.gl/saym69qKXr1fRNoXA 🔗 https://x.com/frontier_one/status/2024438817978273944/photo/1
Hololive Official Shop in Tokyo Station 📍 https://maps.app.goo.gl/wBU9xBULdPHcxvrt6 🔗 https://hololive.hololivepro.com/events/shoptyo/
Fandom Akiba 📍 https://maps.app.goo.gl/GuuaUZ8zsMWHiyeL9
Timestamps 0:00 - Intro 0:48 - Miko Taiyaki collab 3:11 - Holowitch Pop Up (Gamers Akihabara) 5:26 - Sweets Paradise collab cafe 7:41 - NEPOLABO Monster Hunter collab 13:47 - Sayama Ski Resort collab 20:08 - NEPOLABO Tree Village collab 25:31 - Raku Spa Hololive Gamers collab 30:07 - Hololive Official Shop in Tokyo Station 32:31 - HoloMeet Narita Pop Up Shop 35:09 - Fandom Akiba 36:33 - Hololive DEV_IS New Wave Pop Up Store 38:16 - Flow Glow Tower Record collab cafe 44:05 - Saba & Roa Pop Up Store 47:00 - Roa Pop Up Shop in Tokyo Station 48:46 - Ayamy Family Cafe 3 50:38 - Final thoughts
